feedback: Spec creation complete. Generated spec.md (EARS format, 83 acceptance criteria across P1-P4), design.md (architecture, components, data flow, migration plan), tasks.md (23 tasks with dependency graph). Based on comprehensive research of pi-mcp-adapter v2.11.0 reference codebase.
T1 plan: scaffolding with package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bin entry, .gitignore, 27 empty src .ts files, git init. No research needed.

T1 executed: all 29 src files created with export {}, package.json/tsconfig.json/vitest.config.ts/.gitignore/bin entry created. git init + npm install (165 packages, 0 vulns) + tsc --noEmit passed. Initial commit made.
T1 APPROVED. All criteria pass. Minor warning on bin stub unhandled promise (non-blocking, fixed in T21).
T2 APPROVED. All types present, ServerEntry field parity verified, no Pi deps, no UI types, functions exported correctly.
T3 APPROVED after fix. Logger stderr-only verified, parallelLimit guard added, tsc passes, no Pi deps.
T4 APPROVED with fix. Tilde expansion added for user-provided paths via resolveConfigPath. All 6 host paths present, config precedence correct, tsc passes.
T5 APPROVED. Config loader + imports working. Circular dep safe (function declarations hoisted). Merge precedence correct, host config extraction verified, tsc passes.
T6 APPROVED. All criteria pass — cache path, hash fields, atomic write, validity check, no forbidden imports.
T7 APPROVED. All criteria pass — buildToolMetadata, formatSchema, findToolByName, no forbidden imports, resourceNameToToolName local.
T8 APPROVED after fix. 60s expiry buffer added. All exports present, secure permissions, URL invalidation, no forbidden imports.
T9 APPROVED. OAuth flow complete — provider, callback server, flow orchestration. Client name mcp-tool-search, all stderr logging, clean imports.
T10 APPROVED after fix. ParsedInvocation exported, fallback documented as reference behavior, tsc passes, clean imports.
T11 APPROVED. McpServerManager complete — connect dedupe, HTTP transport fallback, OAuth, lifecycle tracking. No UI/sampling/elicitation. Warnings match reference behavior.
T12 APPROVED after fix. Public methods, error handling in health checks, clean shutdown. Sequential close is a minor warning matching reference.
T13 APPROVED. Lazy connect, failure backoff, metadata update, cache flush all working. GatewayState exported. No UI, no Pi deps. Minor O(N) disk I/O warning for flush.
T14 APPROVED. Output guard complete — truncation, image passthrough, env kill switch, correct temp file prefix, clean imports.
T15 APPROVED. Tool registrar complete — all content types handled, structuredContent fallback, clean imports.
T16 APPROVED. All 9 proxy actions exported. No UI sessions, no URL elicitation, no Pi deps. Ambiguity warning matches reference behavior (first match wins).

T17 APPROVED. Direct tools complete — resolveDirectTools, createDirectToolExecutor, buildProxyDescription, getMissingConfiguredDirectToolServers. No UI, no URL elicitation, clean imports. Minor warnings non-blocking.

T18 APPROVED. Proxy tool + dispatch complete — correct priority order, args JSON parsing, auth handling. Warnings about exception vs structured error and unknown action fallthrough are non-blocking (match reference behavior).
T19 APPROVED. State factory complete — createGatewayState, shutdownGatewayState, lifecycle callbacks, health checks. Minor unused import warnings.
T20 APPROVED. MCP server + handlers complete — stdio transport, ListTools (proxy + direct), CallTool dispatch, graceful shutdown. All logs to stderr. No Pi deps.
T21 APPROVED. CLI complete — main() → getConfigFromArgv → startServer, error handling, ESM launcher.
T22 APPROVED. 84 tests across 5 files, all passing. No Pi deps. Minor test description warning non-blocking.
T23 APPROVED. README complete — quick start, client configs, usage examples, config reference, architecture, dev instructions. No Pi refs.
